SEARCH
Package project_biu.configs

Class BinOpAgent

java.lang.Object
project_biu.configs.BinOpAgent
All Implemented Interfaces:
Agent
public class BinOpAgent extends Object implements Agent
An agent that performs a binary operation over two input topics and publishes the result to one output topic.

Wiring is done in the constructor: the agent subscribes to both input topics through the TopicManagerSingleton, and registers itself as a publisher on the output topic so that the Graph.createFromTopics pass can later draw the correct edges.

A result is published only once both inputs have received at least one numeric Message, per the spec's "if there is in fact a Double message in each of the two inputs" rule.

  • Constructor Details

    • BinOpAgent

      public BinOpAgent(String name, String sub1Name, String sub2Name, String pubName, BinaryOperator<Double> op)
      Wires the agent into its two input topics and one output topic.
      Parameters:
      name - this agent's display name
      sub1Name - name of the first input topic
      sub2Name - name of the second input topic
      pubName - name of the output topic
      op - binary operation applied to the two latest numeric inputs

  • Method Details

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Description copied from interface: Agent
      Returns the agent's display name.
      Specified by:
      getName in interface Agent
      Returns:
      the agent's display name. Should be unique per instance within a single configuration so that Graph.createFromTopics() does not collapse two distinct agents into one node.

      Parameters:

      msg - the message itself
